name: Education Savings Bond Program

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must be at least 24 years old before the bond is issued, file a joint return if married, and have a modified adjusted gross income below specific inflation-adjusted thresholds. Expenses must be for the taxpayer, spouse, or dependents at an eligible institution.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes from gross income the interest earned on Series EE and Series I United States savings bonds when the proceeds are used to pay for qualified higher education expenses.
